description_long: This banner is a long, rectangular panel featuring a detailed, sepia-toned illustration reminiscent of a classical or Renaissance mural. The artwork depicts a group of human figures engaged in various activities, with some standing, sitting, or gesturing, arranged in a narrative scene across the length of the banner. The surface appears flat and rigid, with the image printed or painted directly onto the material. The edges are clean and straight, and the banner is relatively thin compared to its length and width. There are no visible mounting elements or support structures attached to the banner itself. The overall appearance suggests it is designed for display on a wall or similar flat surface in a public or cultural space.
description: A long, thin rectangular banner with a classical mural-style illustration of multiple human figures in sepia tones. The surface is flat, rigid, and appears suitable for wall display.
description_view_0: The front face of the banner displays the full illustrated scene with human figures in sepia tones.
description_view_1: A side view showing the thin profile of the banner, with no visible artwork or mounting hardware.
description_view_2: The back face, visually identical to the front, again shows the illustrated mural scene.
description_view_3: Another side view, mirroring view 1, highlighting the slimness of the banner.
attribute_banner_content: classical mural illustration with human figures
